title: Universal Trade Sation
body:
Universal Trade Sation for Minecraft

Sell and buy items from minecraft.

This mod adds a simple block called Universal Trade Station. This block lets de player sell and buy minecraft items and blocks for a price.
Money is stored at save game for each player that sells buy, not attached to any block or item.

Available for:
- Minecraft 1.21.1
  - Neo Forge
 

**Credits**
Inspired on:
- Universal Coins and Universal Coins unofficial from various authors. Similar older mod that lets also buy and sell items.
 

Created with MCreator
